summary: Doc/code drift: docs/01-requirements.md §5 schema still shows id UUID DEFAULT gen_random_uuid() but code uses 24-char hex TEXT (M-18)
mitigation: Flagged for human review; update §5 schema block to TEXT id without DEFAULT

summary: Mixing embedding models with different dimensions corrupts vector search
mitigation: EMBEDDING_DIMENSIONS must not change after first load; pool enforces single model

summary: sample_name is not unique — clients must use id for case identity
mitigation: MCP tools return id; get_case rejects invalid id format; completions removed (DEC-004)

summary: Keywords nullable (~36% empty) — FTS and embedding must handle null
mitigation: Embedding input omits keywords when null; FTS coalesces to empty

summary: Quality thresholds tuned on validation must not leak to test split
mitigation: Tune on validation, gate on test (04-testing.md §6); test split is held-out

summary: Default SecurityConfig permit-all — SSE endpoint exposed without auth in dev
mitigation: Documented; prod JWT wiring not half-done; escalate before prod

summary: Parallel agents editing coupled prompt template + sanitizer without lock produce green-but-broken merge
mitigation: locks/<module>.md must be acquired before editing coupled file pairs; enforced by write-less-code + security-check skills
